workout.finisher: Incline walk · 10 min · 3.3–3.5 mph · 6–8% incline. Skip if session hits 65 min.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.note: June 2: hit 370 × 10 × 3 clean. Adding 10 lb. Controlled tempo, don't lock out at top.

exercises.name: Hip Thrust Machine
exercises.note: June 2: hit 180 × 12 × 3 clean. Plate-loaded — 10 lb increments only. Full hip extension, squeeze at top, no hyperextension.

exercises.name: DB Romanian Deadlift
exercises.note: June 2: hit 55 × 12 × 3 clean, back felt fine. Bumping to 60 lb. Hinge from hips, soft knee, feel the stretch at the bottom.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.note: June 2: barely got the last two reps at 77 lb. Holding here — don't chase it. Cap the last set at 10 even if you feel strong.

exercises.name: Walking Lunge (DB)
exercises.note: First full session at 30 lb — holding to confirm it before bumping. Drive through heel of front foot, back knee close to floor.

exercises.name: Core Circuit D
exercises.detail: Plank Shoulder Tap × 10/side + Dead Bugs × 8/side + Pallof Press 40 lb × 10/side · 3 rounds
exercises.rest: Minimal rest between movements, 60s between rounds
exercises.note: 3 rounds today — you skipped core Wednesday, this makes up for it. Plank taps: keep hips still. Dead bugs: lower back flat throughout. Pallof: stand tall, resist the pull.
